subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur hath proclaimed: There is no God but Me, the Single, the All-Knowing. The Promise and the Promised One have come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان العظمه انه لا اله الا انا الفرد الخبیر قد اتی الوعد و الموعود
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
